Get Started
AI for Small Business

AI for small business
that actually works.

Not hype. Not prompt libraries. Real Claude workflows built into how your team operates — with measurable time savings your whole company uses.

Get AI Working → Our Services
Why it hasn't worked yet

The experiments don't stick.
The tool isn't the problem.

🧪
Experiments that don't stick
You tried it. It was interesting. Then you went back to doing things the old way because no process changed.
📚
Too much to learn
Prompt engineering, model selection, tool comparisons — the learning curve is real, and you have a business to run.
🧍
Only you using it
You get the benefit. Your team doesn't. Without implementation and training, AI stays a solo experiment.
❓
Unclear ROI
Something improved. You're not sure what. You can't justify expanding it without knowing what you're getting.
What we do

We implement AI. You use it.
Everyone measures it.

01
Workflow Audit
We map your current processes and find the highest-leverage places for AI to fit — specific to your team, not a generic list.
02
Claude Configuration
Account setup, Projects, system prompts, and knowledge bases — everything configured before your team touches it.
03
Workflow Build
Working workflows, not templates. Processes your team can run repeatedly, reliably, without constant maintenance.
04
Team Training
Hands-on sessions with your whole team — everyone leaves knowing exactly what to use AI for and how to do it right.
05
Integration Planning
A roadmap for connecting AI to your existing tools — CRM, email, docs — and when it makes sense to do it.
06
ROI Measurement
Before-and-after time tracking on your specific workflows. Real numbers you can use to justify and expand.
Use Cases

What AI handles for small businesses.

Sales Outreach Content Creation Research & Analysis Proposals Customer Communications SOPs & Documentation Hiring Docs Meeting Summaries
